overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA IV) showing a character walking across an urban bridge at dusk. The character navigates a crosswalk with passing traffic, then proceeds along a pedestrian walkway under elevated train tracks with the Liberty City skyline visible in the background.

zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stands at an urban street corner beneath elevated train tracks, preparing to cross. The environment features industrial brick architecture, an advertising kiosk, and a crosswalk leading across the multi-lane street.

events.description: yellow taxi passes from left to right in front of the character
white van approaches and passes from right to left across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk while monitoring passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, navigating between passing vehicles including a yellow taxi and white van. The city skyline becomes visible in the distance against the dusk sky while the character moves from the sidewalk onto the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge pedestrian walkway with city skyline view

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the bridge walkway, with ornate railings on the left and the elevated tracks now to the right. The city skyline dominates the view ahead, and a female pedestrian passes by walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway under curved elevated train tracks

events.description: character passes a male pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge walkway under the elevated train tracks, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: row of classic brownstone apartment buildings with stoops and bay windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the curved elevated train tracks, which now dominate the overhead space. The environment becomes more enclosed and urban, with brownstone residential buildings lining the right side and street lights illuminating the path. Another pedestrian passes by as the character continues along the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a busy urban street corner across a bridge toward an enclosed pedestrian walkway under elevated train tracks. It begins beside industrial brick architecture and an advertising kiosk as the character prepares to cross a multi-lane street. As the character moves onto the crosswalk, the view expands to reveal a distant city skyline against the dusk sky while navigating between a yellow taxi and a white van. The scene then shifts to a bridge walkway with ornate railings and the skyline dominating the horizon, where a female pedestrian passes in the opposite direction. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera follows the character beneath the curved overhead tracks, passing brownstone residential buildings and street lights.
